generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel with 30 years of service, I've seen firsthand how critical it is for our nation to maintain strategic autonomy. The recent cyber-attacks on our infrastructure prove that relying on foreign allies for defense isn't enough. We need to invest in our own capabilities to ensure our security. The alternative is too risky in today's uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
